THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRENT, DIANA L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUMABEILLER, MARIE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT $3,000.00 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(L) IN BAD FAITH. PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DUMABEILLER, MARIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BRENT, DIANA L STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION OF DIANA L. BRENT RE: ADDRESS UPDATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRENT, DIANA L

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2017 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-02-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT CREDITOR DIANA BRENT IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARIE DUMABEILLER IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY THE TOTAL BALANCE DUR OF $7575.00 BY MARCH 2, 2017. PARTIES AGREE THAT IF THE BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL NEITHER PARTY WILL APPEAR AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
